SetText.Description: Set the text of the text display entity

SetShadowed.Description: Set whether this text display entity is shadowed

SetSeeThrough.Description: Set whether the text is see through or not

SetTextOpacity.Description: Set the opacity of the text within a range from 0-255

SetLineWidth.Description: Set the line width for the text display entity

SetAlignment.Description: Set the alignment of the text

SetBackgroundColor.Description: Set the background color of the text display entity
